R1.label: Max Complacency
R1.detail: Low COR1M + steep contango — buy the umbrella while sunny

R2.label: Early Warning
R2.detail: Low COR1M + front flattening/inverting — watch closely

R3.label: Regime Turn
R3.detail: Rising COR1M + contango compressing — risk-off ramping

R4.label: Post-Shock
R4.detail: High COR1M + backwardation — shock already happened

presets.name: Total Champion
presets.desc: Most trades. thr 9.0, delta -0.20, VVIX<110 (corrected 2026-06-16, 2× VIX-down: +$81,610, n=103, MAR ~4). Higher bleed than the -0.10 wing.

presets.name: Sweet Spot
presets.desc: Old default (thr 7.75, delta -0.20, VVIX<110). Corrected 2026-06-16, 2× VIX-down: +$29,900, MAR 2.12 — the -0.20 wing bleeds too much. Superseded by Convex Tail.

presets.name: MAR Champion
presets.desc: Best risk-adjusted. thr 7.75, delta -0.075, VVIX<110. 72 trades, +$71,670, MAR 14.75 (2× VIX-down sizing).

presets.name: Balanced
presets.desc: ★ RECOMMENDED (sweep winner 2026-06-16; 2 contracts on overnight-VIX-down days, else 1). thr 7.75, delta -0.10, VVIX<110. RE-ARM rule (owner 2026-07-20): after each profit it re-arms the next day while COR1M stays ≤ 7.75, so it never goes naked during a persistent complacency regime. +$79,550, 74 trades, worst day -$640. Near-flat vs the old exit-on-first-profit-then-wait-for-recross (+$79,340) but closes the "insured on entry, exposed while still complacent" gap at no cost to worst day or drawdown.

presets.name: Wide Net
presets.desc: Higher threshold catches more crosses. thr 9.5, delta -0.20, VVIX<110. 128 trades, +$95,070, MAR 5.51 (2× VIX-down sizing).

presets.name: Baseline (article)
presets.desc: Article's default settings. thr 8.25, delta -0.20, no VVIX filter. Validates the original concept.
